features: INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Each tablet is packed with high-quality essential oils that not only smell divine but also provide therapeutic benefits. Eucalyptus oil helps clear the mind and breathe deep, making it perfect for stuffy days. Lavender promotes a sense of peace, ideal for those moments when stress feels overwhelming.

VERSATILE AROMATIC CHOICES: These shower steamers come in three delightful scents: Eucalyptus for energy, Lavender for calm, and Ylang Ylang for joy. Choose your favourite based on your mood or the time of day, making each shower a tailored experience. Whether it's an energising morning pick-me-up or a soothing evening wind-down, there's a scent for every occasion.

EASY TO USE: Using these shower steamers is as simple as it gets! Just unwrap a tablet, place it under the warm shower stream, and let the magic happen. In seconds, the steam will activate the essential oils, creating an aromatic oasis right in your own bathroom. No complicated steps, just pure enjoyment.

CONVENIENT 3-PACK DESIGN: This trio of shower steamers ensures that you have a fresh, fragrant option ready whenever you need a little extra care. Keep them in the bathroom for a daily dose of relaxation or stash one in your travel toiletries for a mini spa experience away from home. Perfect for quick getaways or vacations!

LUXURIOUS SPA EXPERIENCE AT HOME: Why spend a fortune at a spa when you can recreate that luxurious feeling at home? These shower steamers elevate an ordinary shower into a spa-like experience, allowing anyone to indulge in self-care without stepping out. Just breathe deep and unwind!

IDEAL FOR SELF-CARE ROUTINES: Incorporating these steamers into a self-care routine is a breeze. After a long day, simply take a few minutes to enjoy the calming effects of your favourite scent. Perfect for busy individuals looking to carve out a moment of peace in their hectic schedules.

TRAVEL-FRIENDLY SIZE: These shower steamers are designed with travel in mind. Their compact size makes them easy to pack with your mini toiletries, ensuring you can indulge in a soothing shower experience no matter where life takes you. No more sacrificing self-care while on the go!

PERFECT GIFTS FOR WOMEN: Searching for unique gifts for women? These shower steamers make a thoughtful and delightful surprise for birthdays, holidays, or just because! Brighten someone's day with the gift of relaxation, showing you care about their well-being and happiness.

GREAT FOR ALL AGES: Suitable for everyone, these shower steamers are perfect for both adults and teens. Whether someone needs a moment of calm after school or a refreshing wake-up before work, these scents cater to various preferences and ages.

GIFTING MADE EASY: Whether it’s a special occasion or a random act of kindness, gifting these shower steamers is a breeze. Pack them in a gift bag or pair them with a cute bathrobe for the ultimate relaxation package. They are bound to be a hit, bringing joy to anyone who receives them!
description: Product Description Elevate your shower experience with Elysium Spa Shower Steamers, a delightful trio of infused tablets that turn an everyday routine into a blissful retreat. Available in three soothing scents—Eucalyptus, Lavender, and Ylang Ylang—these shower steamers are designed to transport you to a world of relaxation, no matter where you are. Just imagine stepping into your shower, placing one of these fragrant wonders under the warm stream, and letting the calming aromas envelop you. Whether you're seeking to recharge your spirit after a busy day or unwind before bedtime, these shower steamers make every shower an indulgent escape. Each tablet is infused with pure essential oils, offering not just an uplifting fragrance, but also the benefits of aromatherapy. Eucalyptus oil invigorates the senses, making it perfect for a morning boost. Lavender helps soothe and calm the mind, providing the ideal atmosphere for a peaceful night's rest. Ylang Ylang adds a touch of floral elegance, promoting relaxation and joy. With these steamers, self-care has never been so accessible or enjoyable. Plus, they come in a handy travel size pack, making them perfect for on-the-go pampering. Slip them into your travel toiletries for your next adventure, ensuring that relaxation follows you wherever you roam. Transform your shower into a spa-like haven with Elysium Spa Shower Steamers and discover how a simple act can become a cherished ritual. Directions Remove from foil and place directly under the shower stream, rinsing until fully dissolved. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Retain product pack for information. See more
